16*$T1 + 32*$T2 + floor(1/8*$T0) + 256*Piecewise((floor($WG0*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N)), $WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M) >= 0 & -Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) < 0), (Mod(floor($WG0*1/GROUP_SIZE_N + $WG1*1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/256*M)), ceiling(1/256*M)), True))
16*xor(Mod($T0, 8), Mod(floor(1/8*$T0), 8))
1/2*K*(16*$T1 + 32*$T2 + floor(1/8*$T0) + 256*Piecewise((floor($WG0*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N)), $WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M) >= 0 & -Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) < 0), (Mod(floor($WG0*1/GROUP_SIZE_N + $WG1*1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/256*M)), ceiling(1/256*M)), True))) + 16*xor(Mod($T0, 8), Mod(floor(1/8*$T0), 8))

32 + 16*$T1 + 32*$T2 + floor(1/8*$T0) + 256*Piecewise((floor($WG0*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N)), $WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M) >= 0 & -Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) < 0), (Mod(floor($WG0*1/GROUP_SIZE_N + $WG1*1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/256*M)), ceiling(1/256*M)), True))

16*xor(Mod($T0, 8), Mod(floor(1/8*$T0), 8))
1/2*K*(Mod(160 + 16*$T1 + 32*$T2 + floor(1/8*$T0), 256) + 256*Piecewise((floor($WG0*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N)), $WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M) >= 0 & -Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) < 0), (Mod(floor($WG0*1/GROUP_SIZE_N + $WG1*1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/256*M)), ceiling(1/256*M)), True))) + 16*xor(Mod($T0, 8), Mod(floor(1/8*$T0), 8))
Mod(160 + 16*$T1 + 32*$T2 + floor(1/8*$T0), 256) + 256*Piecewise((floor($WG0*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N)), $WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M) >= 0 & -Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) < 0), (Mod(floor($WG0*1/GROUP_SIZE_N + $WG1*1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/256*M)), ceiling(1/256*M)), True))
128 + 16*xor(Mod($T0, 8), Mod(floor(1/8*$T0), 8))

floor(128*1/K*Mod($T0, 64)) + 256*Piecewise((floor($WG0*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N)), $WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M) >= 0 & -Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) < 0), (Mod(floor($WG0*1/GROUP_SIZE_N + $WG1*1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/256*M)), ceiling(1/256*M)), True)) + 32*Min(7, 4 + 2*$T1 + 4*$T2 + floor(1/64*$T0))
Mod(4*Mod($T0, 64), 1/32*K)

384 + 128*$ARGK + 1/2*K*(Mod(224 + 16*$T1 + 32*$T2 + floor(1/8*$T0), 256) + 256*Piecewise((floor($WG0*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N)), $WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M) >= 0 & -Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) < 0), (Mod(floor($WG0*1/GROUP_SIZE_N + $WG1*1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/256*M)), ceiling(1/256*M)), True))) + 16*xor(Mod($T0, 8), Mod(floor(1/8*$T0), 8))
0
1024*floor(1/64*$T0) + 4*Mod($T0, 64)
floor(8192*1/K*(3 + $ARGK) + 128*1/K*Mod($T0, 64)) + 256*Piecewise((floor($WG0*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N)), $WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M) >= 0 & -Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) < 0), (Mod(floor($WG0*1/GROUP_SIZE_N + $WG1*1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/256*M)), ceiling(1/256*M)), True)) + 32*Min(7, 4 + 2*$T1 + 4*$T2 + floor(1/64*$T0))
Mod(768 + 256*$ARGK + 4*Mod($T0, 64), 1/32*K)
768 + 256*$ARGK + 8*K*Piecewise((floor($WG0*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N)), $WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/256*M) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/192*N))*ceiling(1/256*M) >= 0 & -Mod(ceiling(1/192*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) < 0), (Mod(floor($WG0*1/GROUP_SIZE_N + $WG1*1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/256*M)), ceiling(1/256*M)), True)) + K*Min(7, 4 + 2*$T1 + 4*$T2 + floor(1/64*$T0)) + 4*Mod($T0, 64)
0
2 + 1024*floor(1/64*$T0) + 4*Mod($T0, 64)

1 + 1024*floor(1/64*$T0) + 4*Mod($T0, 64)

256 + 1024*floor(1/64*$T0) + 4*Mod($T0, 64)
